title: Darkmode
description: 🌙🖤 Dark Mode Resource Pack with 100+ Mods supported
body:
![App Screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/fmW2wEZ.png)
![App Screenshot](https://i.imgur.com/Dj5f4Mb.png)

### Dark Mode for Minecraft
This resource pack provides dark mode themes for most of the popular mods for Minecraft. If you want to request a Mod or have a different issue you can open a github issue [here](https://github.com/haminaa/darkmode/issues/new/choose).

#
